title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: Tutorial demonstrating how to set up and use Claude Code with Ollama to build agentic AI applications locally without paid APIs. Shows installation of Ollama, selection of LLMs like Qwen 3.5, and construction of a multi-agent travel booking application with Flask UI.
